title: Vanguard Athletic Logo — Spot-Color Separation, Vectorization & Multi-Format Screen-Print Package
one_line_ask: Refine my ChatGPT-made "Vanguard" athletic badge into clean, separated spot-color screen-print artwork (olive drab / khaki / black / dark grey + digital camo), vectorize it, and deliver it in multiple file formats with spot-color info.

issues: Slightly soft, anti-aliased edges and faint tilt (acceptable per brief, but present)
Color fills are a bit muddy and non-uniform (expected for a source asset)
Flag motif is somewhat abstracted but recognizable; chevrons and star are clear
Soldier/minuteman head is stylized, facing left as required
Three chevrons present but rendered as two visible V-shapes stacked (could be interpreted as two chevrons rather than three depending on brief strictness)
Flag motif uses only one star rather than the traditional canton field, though brief specifies a single five-point star so this is compliant
Slight muddy low-contrast fill on olive ring band — acceptable per brief
Anti-aliased soft edges visible on soldier silhouette and flag stripes — acceptable per brief
Slight muddiness in the dark grey and black clusters in the lower-left quadrant reduces contrast marginally, which may require minor level adjustment before vectorization
Pattern density is slightly heavier/darker in the lower half, creating a subtle luminance gradient across the tile that could affect seamless tiling

assets.name: vanguard_separations_source.ai
assets.note: Client-provided .ai template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
